title: International Technology Licensing Agreement — Revision History

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: Licensor means GlobalTech Corp. Licensee means AsiaNet Holdings Ltd. Licensed Technology means the platform described in Schedule A.

clauses.title: License Grant
clauses.text: Licensor grants Licensee a non-exclusive worldwide license to use the Licensed Technology.

clauses.title: Fees
clauses.text: Licensee shall pay an initial fee of $2M and quarterly royalties of 4% of net revenue.

clauses.title: Support
clauses.text: Licensor shall provide 24/7 technical support with 2-hour SLA for critical issues.

clauses.title: Term and Renewal
clauses.text: This Agreement has an initial term of five (5) years. It shall automatically renew for successive two-year periods unless either party gives written notice of non-renewal at least one hundred eighty (180) days before the end of the then-current term. Early termination is not permitted during any renewal period.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of England and Wales. Arbitration under ICC rules in London.

clauses.text: This Agreement has an initial term of five (5) years. It shall automatically renew for successive two-year periods unless either party gives written notice of non-renewal at least one hundred eighty (180) days before the end of the then-current term. Early termination is not permitted during any renewal period.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of England and Wales. Arbitration under ICC rules in London.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Both parties shall protect confidential information for ten (10) years from disclosure.

clauses.title: IP Ownership
clauses.text: All IP in Licensed Technology remains with Licensor. Improvements by Licensee are jointly owned.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: Licensed Technology shall conform to specs for 24 months from deployment.

clauses.title: Warranty Disclaimer
clauses.text: EXCEPT AS SET FORTH IN THE WARRANTY CLAUSE, ALL WARRANTIES ARE DISCLAIMED INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.

clauses.title: Liability Cap
clauses.text: Total liability capped at fees paid in preceding 24 months.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Licensor indemnifies Licensee against IP infringement claims.

clauses.title: Export Controls
clauses.text: Licensee shall comply with all applicable export control laws and regulations.

clauses.title: Data Localization
clauses.text: All data processing shall occur within the EU unless otherwise required by the regulatory framework.

clauses.title: Insurance
clauses.text: Licensee shall maintain professional liability insurance of at least $10M.

clauses.title: Convenience Exit Mechanism
clauses.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this Agreement, either party shall have the unconditional and irrevocable right to terminate this Agreement at any time, for any reason or no reason, upon providing thirty (30) calendar days advance written notification, and such termination shall take effect regardless of the status of the current term, including during any renewal period.

clauses.title: Force Majeure
clauses.text: Neither party liable for force majeure events lasting less than 90 days.

clauses.title: Audit Rights
clauses.text: Licensor may audit Licensee royalty calculations annually.

clauses.title: Non-Solicitation
clauses.text: Neither party shall solicit the other employees during the term and for 12 months after.

clauses.title: Public Information
clauses.text: Nothing in this Agreement restricts either party from disclosing information that is publicly available, independently developed, or required by law.

clauses.title: Assignment
clauses.text: Neither party may assign without prior written consent, except to an affiliate.

clauses.title: Entire Agreement
clauses.text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement and supersedes all prior agreements.

clauses.title: Counterparts
clauses.text: May be executed in counterparts, each deemed an original.
